description_long: This is a long, rectangular playground featuring multiple play structures arranged linearly on a green surface with brown borders. The playground includes various equipment such as climbing frames, slides, monkey bars, and balance beams, all spaced out along the length of the area. The structures are primarily constructed from metal and plastic, with some wooden elements possibly present in the platforms or borders. Blue and green are the dominant colors, with some brown areas likely representing safety surfacing or pathways. The playground is open-air, with no visible shade structures or large enclosures, and safety barriers such as guardrails are present around elevated platforms. The overall design is functional and modern, focusing on maximizing play variety within a narrow, elongated footprint.
description: A long, narrow playground with multiple climbing frames, slides, and play equipment on a green and brown surface. The design is modern and functional, with safety barriers and a variety of play options.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the playground and the arrangement of play structures along the green surface.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the narrow width and the linear arrangement of equipment, with some structures visible in profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the full lineup of play equipment and safety barriers.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the narrow width and the sequence of play structures.
